# Description

Describe what your pull request is about. Also try to describe your process.
What approach did you use and why? What AI Agent(s) did you use to help you (if applicable)?
This allows me to better understand the context of your PR and review it more easily.

# Linked issues

Mention or link any [GitHub issues](https://github.com/jdorsman/TradeTracker/issues), if an issue exists for what your PR is addressing.

# Tested

Did you test your code on any clients?

- [ ] Yes, I tested my code on game version: ___ (enter your game client version on the underlined part, for example: 2.5.5)
- [ ] No, I was not able to test my code
